title: libwacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[1.12.1-5]
- Rearrange the OSD buttons for the Intuos Pro 3rd Gen (RHEL-101881)
- Use separate Ring/Ring2 assignments

[1.12.1-4]
- Add support for the Cintiq Pro 27 (RHEL-101886)
- Add support for the Intuos Pro 3rd Gen series (RHEL-101881)
full_text:
[1.12.1-5]
- Rearrange the OSD buttons for the Intuos Pro 3rd Gen (RHEL-101881)
- Use separate Ring/Ring2 assignments

[1.12.1-4]
- Add support for the Cintiq Pro 27 (RHEL-101886)
- Add support for the Intuos Pro 3rd Gen series (RHEL-101881)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-15894.html
